source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Operational English UI with Japanese typography guidance for kitchen prep logs, herb inventory labels, timer states, sortable tables, command search, and calm status copy.
layout: Dense kitchen dashboards, compact sidebar navigation, 8px radii, needle-green primary actions, lavender-blue info accents, woody warning states, stone dividers, and subtle rosemary stripe textures.

prompts.label: Transparent Rosemary motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Rosemary transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create a single rosemary sprig isolated for a transparent cutout, no environment, no props, no text.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for background removal.
Subject: one elegant Mediterranean rosemary sprig with woody brown stem, many narrow needle-like leaves in deep needle green and silvery sage green, a few small lavender-blue rosemary flowers attached near the upper nodes, botanical accuracy, crisp opaque plant edges.
Style/medium: high-detail botanical cutout, natural kitchen daylight, realistic painted-photographic finish, fine leaf texture, subtle woody grain.
Composition/framing: centered complete sprig, diagonal but fully visible, generous padding on all sides, no cropping, no floor plane.
Lighting/mood: focused kitchen system mood, clear and practical, bright but soft, no cast shadow and no contact shadow.
Color palette: needle green, silvery sage leaf underside, lavender blue flower, warm wood brown stem, tiny pale botanical highlights only; do not use magenta in the subject.
Transparent workflow: background must be one uniform #ff00ff color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Keep subject fully separated from background with crisp edges.
Constraints: no vase, no hand, no bundle, no cutting board, no kitchen objects, no landscape, no decorative background, no second sprig, no text, no watermark, no shadows, no reflections.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: 16:9 high-resolution light-mode design-system board for Morphous catalog
Input images: the visible rosemary motif.png is the source reference for colors, texture, form language, and system identity.
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode shadcn/tweakcn-like design-system board titled "Morphous Rosemary".
Canvas: 3840 x 2160, 16:9, crisp readable UI labels and token names, no tiny text.
Required visible sections: palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
System mood: focused kitchen system for prep logs, inventory, timers, and recipe operations; utilitarian, clear, aromatic Mediterranean garden influence, dense but polished product UI.
Color palette: derive only from the rosemary motif: deep needle green, silvery sage leaf underside, lavender-blue rosemary blossoms, warm woody stem brown, herb shadow olive, pale botanical highlight, dry garden stone neutral, warm kitchen parchment. Avoid unrelated saturated colors, generic purple/blue gradients, one-note green styling, beige-dominant styling, and stock UI-kit colors.
Layout: polished design board, left palette/token rail, central component and form examples, right dashboard/table/search/status modules, bottom row for texture, radius, spacing, shadow samples. Include a small rosemary motif cutout preview.
Typography: clear English UI type plus Japanese typography section with headings, body, captions, numerals, and examples such as "ローズマリー", "キッチン記録", "仕込み", "状態".
Components: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, card, table rows, command/search palette, compact sidebar navigation, metric cards, chart lines/bars, loading/empty/error/success states.
Navigation/dashboard/data: kitchen prep sidebar, inventory counters, herb stock chart, task status timeline, compact data table.
Forms/tables/search: ingredient form, quantity controls, date/time fields, searchable command menu, sortable table rows.
Texture/materials: fine needle-leaf stripe texture, lavender flower accent dots, woody stem grain borders, dry Mediterranean garden stone speckles.
Tokens: show radius 8px, spacing scale, border, ring, shadows, chart tokens, sidebar tokens, primary/secondary/accent/destructive roles.
Constraints: every visible UI element uses 8px radius or less; labels must fit inside containers; professional product design board; no marketing hero, no abstract gradients, no extra colors beyond motif-derived palette, no watermark.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: 16:9 high-resolution dark-mode design-system board for Morphous catalog
Input images: the visible Morphous Rosemary motif.png and the visible Morphous Rosemary light design-system board are source references.
Primary request: Generate a separate dark-mode translation titled exactly "Morphous Rosemary". It must feel like the same focused kitchen system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Canvas: 3840 x 2160, 16:9, crisp readable UI labels and token names, no tiny text.
Required visible sections: dark palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
System mood: focused kitchen system for prep logs, inventory, timers, and recipe operations at night; utilitarian, calm, dense but polished product UI with aromatic Mediterranean garden cues.
Color palette: derive only from the rosemary motif and light board: deepest needle green and herb-shadow olive for backgrounds, pale sage and kitchen parchment for foreground text, lavender-blue rosemary blossoms for accent/info states, warm woody stem brown for warnings and dividers, dry garden stone neutrals for borders. Avoid neon colors, pure black, unrelated saturated colors, generic purple or blue gradients, one-note green styling, and stock UI-kit colors.
Layout: polished dark design board, left palette/token rail, central component and form examples, right dashboard/table/search/status modules, bottom row for texture, radius, spacing, shadow samples. Include a small rosemary motif cutout preview.
Typography: clear English UI type plus Japanese typography section with headings, body, captions, numerals, and examples such as "ローズマリー", "キッチン記録", "仕込み", "状態".
Components: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, card, table rows, command/search palette, compact sidebar navigation, metric cards, chart lines/bars, loading/empty/error/success states.
Navigation/dashboard/data: kitchen prep sidebar, inventory counters, herb stock chart, task status timeline, compact data table.
Forms/tables/search: ingredient form, quantity controls, date/time fields, searchable command menu, sortable table rows.
Texture/materials: subtle dark needle-leaf stripe texture, lavender flower accent dots, woody stem grain borders, dry Mediterranean garden stone speckles.
Tokens: show radius 8px, spacing scale, border, ring, shadows, chart tokens, sidebar tokens, primary/secondary/accent/destructive roles.
Constraints: title must read Morphous Rosemary, not mint or any other herb; every visible UI element uses 8px radius or less; labels must fit inside containers; professional product design board; no marketing hero, no abstract gradients, no extra colors beyond motif-derived palette, no watermark.
